remarks: Move-in ready 2BR/1BA in a private waterside building! This first-floor unit offers a spacious living room and a large eat-in kitchen with white cabinetry, a gas range, and plenty of room for a dining table. Both bedrooms feature generous closet space, and the full bathroom includes a shower/tub combo. Enjoy the convenience of a designated off-street parking space. Ideally located near Metro-North, Stamford Hospital, and public transportation-just minutes from all that downtown Stamford has to offer!
